zh.Erdswick, Minshull Vernon, Cheshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭爾明書爾 弗農
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel Bunbury於大約1250年出生在英國爾布波瑞時，她的父親William de Bunbury26歲，母親Matilda Baroness de Bunbury27歲。她和Matthew de Hulgreve至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1310年享年62歲。

zh-hans.Erdswick, Minshull Vernon, Cheshire, Eng: 英国英格兰爾明書爾 弗農
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel Bunbury于大约1250年出生在英国爾布波瑞时，她的父亲William de Bunbury26岁，母亲Matilda Baroness de Bunbury27岁。她和Matthew de Hulgreve至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1310年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bunbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel Bunbury was born about 1250, in Bunbury, Cheshire, England, her father, William de Bunbury, was 26 and her mother, Matilda Baroness de Bunbury, was 27. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Matthew de Hulgreve. She died about 1310, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel Bunbury est née environ 1250, à Bunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Bunbury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda Baroness de Bunbury, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Matthew de Hulgreve. Elle est décédée environ 1310, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Bunbury(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 체실르 버버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Bunbury(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Baroness de Bunbury(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Matthew de Hulgreve(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1310년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.
